calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-27-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Eric R. Fleming, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Jessica Stuart Pliner, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Hyonjin Sim, not present in court
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Mike Handy, Melessa Handy,
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.

Witness: Victor Sim sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages: $69,782.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $12,593.28
Attorney's Fees: $2420.00
Costs: $887.97
Total Judgment in the amount of $76,683.25

Judgment signed in open court.
